command: cp -r /tmp/moreno-ai-setup /home/jose/moreno-ai 2>&1 && echo "--- runtime files ---" && ls /home/jose/moreno-ai/runtime/ && echo "--- agents ---" && ls /home/jose/moreno-ai/agents/ && echo "--- git log ---" && cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && git log --oneline -2 && echo "--- disk ---" && du -sh /home/jose/moreno-ai && echo PERSISTENT_DONE
